intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把古老乐器、被动语态物件履历和最后的规则/修理结尾读顺。

sentences.text: We have an old musical instrument.
sentences.focus_zh: old musical instrument 要连成一个整体，表示“一件古老的乐器”。
clavichord 要慢一点读清楚，它是早期、安静、脆弱的键盘乐器。

sentences.text: It was made in Germany in 1681.
sentences.focus_zh: was made 是被动语态，Germany 和 1681 要读出物件的来历和年代。

sentences.text: It has belonged to our family for a long time.
sentences.focus_zh: has belonged to 表示从过去一直属于这个家庭，for a long time 是很久以来。

sentences.text: Recently it was damaged by a visitor.
sentences.focus_zh: Recently 是不久前，was damaged by a visitor 要读出事故是发生在这件物品身上。

sentences.text: She tried to play jazz on it!
sentences.focus_zh: 读出惊讶感，但记住 jazz 不是坏东西，问题是弹法和老乐器不匹配。

sentences.text: She struck the keys too hard and two of the strings were broken.
sentences.focus_zh: struck the keys too hard 是太用力按琴键，strings were broken 是琴弦被弄断。

sentences.text: Now we are not allowed to touch it. It is being repaired by a friend of my father's.
sentences.focus_zh: not allowed to touch it 是新的边界，is being repaired 表示修理正在进行。
